name: AI for energy flexibility, grid optimization, and industrial energy efficiency
why_this_slice: The EU Funding data already returns many energy-grid and industrial decarbonization calls, so grants are available for this domain.
The business buyer is concrete: utilities, grid operators, manufacturers, energy retailers, industrial sites, and property portfolios.
The investor story is focused: software, data, grid flexibility, storage, demand response, and industrial optimization are easier to compare than a broad AI market.
The researcher story is natural: forecasting, optimization, control systems, digital twins, computer vision for assets, and trustworthy AI can become pilots.

arxiv: artificial intelligence energy flexibility grid optimization
machine learning demand response energy systems
reinforcement learning smart grid energy management
eu_funding: energy flexibility data driven decision making
